sample_resumes.name: Alice Chen
sample_resumes.text:
Alice Chen
Senior Data Scientist

Contact
Email: alice.chen@email.com
Phone: (415) 555-8901

Summary
Data scientist with 6 years of experience in machine learning and data analytics. Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, and cloud platforms. Led cross-functional teams to deliver data-driven products.

Experience
6 years of experience in data science and ML.
Led a team of analysts. Built predictive models. Deployed ML pipelines.

Skills
Python, R, SQL, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, AWS, Docker, Tableau, Spark, PostgreSQL

Education
Master of Science in Statistics
Stanford University | 2017

Certifications
AWS Machine Learning Specialty

Soft Skills
Leadership, Communication, Problem-solving
